episodes.title: Father's Of Cults S2 Ep.034
episodes.description: What drives ordinary people to surrender their lives, beliefs, and identities to a charismatic leader? In this chilling episode of That's Effin Weird, host Stevenson Longbottom explores the dark and fascinating world of cults. From the manipulative influence of Charles Manson and the infamous Manson Family murders to the tragic siege involving the Branch Davidians in Waco, Texas, we examine how these groups gained power and why people followed them. We'll also discuss lesser-known cult leaders and controversial figures such as Jeffrey Warren, along with the psychological tactics used to recruit and control followers. Through stories of devotion, manipulation, isolation, and tragedy, we'll uncover the warning signs that turn movements into cults and leaders into dangerous icons. Join us as we venture into one of the strangest and most disturbing corners of human behavior. Because sometimes the scariest monsters aren't cryptids or ghosts—they're the people who convince others to follow them without question. And that's effin weird. Host: Stevenson Longbotom Cohost: none Guest: none That's Effin Weird Social Media: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCZ4LwMP_6yF3V42LY-8xyHQ/videos https://discord.com/invite/pbrwZjVGUy https://www.instagram.com/thatseffinweird/ https://www.zazzle.com/store/thatseffinweird https://buymeacoffee.com/thatseffinweird

episodes.title: Modern Mystery School Interview Ep.040
episodes.description: Join us as we explore the mysterious and oft-controversial Modern Mystery School. Learn about the theoretical and spiritual teachings offered, their roots in King Solomon's 3000 year-old lineage, and their progression through the generations. Hear experiences of former members who claim to have gained spiritual awakening and unlocked their full potential through the school. Discover the accusations of sexual abuse and controlling behavior, and the possible implications of tax evasion and misuse of charities. Are the teachings of the Modern Mystery School truly a key to unlocking a greater understanding of life and accessing an infinite power, or is it yet another cult with a hidden agenda? With the help from Damion, a journalist from Irland, we will go over the Hows and Whys of this cult. Check out some of his stuff below:  https://dialogueireland.wordpress.com/2021/05/23/modern-mystery-school-money-magic-sex-and-power/ If you know of someone who might in need of help:   www.cult-escape.com
